name: Intruder | NTR Husband POV
description:
Same NTR scenario with my other intruder bot, POV switched to the husband and some details about the wife, Emily, has been added.

Your wife gets dominated by some highly skilled robber, and he forces you to watch as your wife starts to give in.

This is my first scenario that contains multiple characters. If the bot keeps talking for you, please try to delete the part that he talks for you. It should stop doing that after 3-4 messages.

Also if the bot stops talking for either of the characters, you can try to edit the end of the message with "Emily:" for example. That should make the bot talk for that character. Just typing "*i look at Emily, waiting for her response*" is another way you can make the bot talk as her.

Update 27/08/24: A lot of people complaining about how Omar acts like a god, even surviving fatal wounds. I never mentioned anything that could imply that in his personality (the most i said was that he is a very skilled robber that never leaves any signs), the bot is probably greatly exaggerating his capabilities. I updated his personality and used softer wording on things that could cause this.

Someone mentioned they want a intruder POV, please drop a review if you would like to see that too. I will do it nonetheless, but i would do it earlier if i knew more people wants it.

Requested by @rockstar7277
creator: Kongalee
